keyEvents.text: Goal!  Aruba 1, Cayman Islands 0. Terence Groothusen (Aruba) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Roviën Ostiana.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Wesley Robinson replaces Joshewa Frederick-Charlery because of an injury.
Substitution, Aruba. Edward Clarissa replaces Kymani Nedd because of an injury.
Goal!  Aruba 2, Cayman Islands 0. Roviën Ostiana (Aruba) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mishawn Molina   following a fast break.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Rashaad Powery replaces Barry-Dre Tibbetts.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Corey Smith replaces Alexander Clarke-Ramírez.
Substitution, Aruba. Jaydon Dania replaces Mishawn Molina.
Substitution, Aruba. Nathan Lo-A-Njoe replaces Diederick Luydens.
Goal!  Aruba 2, Cayman Islands 1. Gunnar Studenthofft (Cayman Islands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Zachary Scott   following a fast break.
Jah Dain Alexander (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Aruba 3, Cayman Islands 1. Benjamin Maria (Aruba) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Roviën Ostiana.
Substitution, Aruba. Glenbert Croes replaces Stiven Melchor Rua.
Substitution, Aruba. Nickenson Paul replaces Mark Jacobs.
Second yellow card to Jah Dain Alexander (Cayman Islands) for a bad foul.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Romario Dixon replaces Elijah Seymour.
Goal!  Aruba 4, Cayman Islands 1. Jaydon Dania (Aruba) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Terence Groothusen.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Casey McLaughlin replaces Gunnar Studenthofft.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Anthony Nelson replaces Zachary Scott.
Substitution, Aruba. Marcus Portier replaces Fernando Lewis.
Goal!  Aruba 5, Cayman Islands 1. Terence Groothusen (Aruba) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Roviën Ostiana.
